options.content:
Carteira GN$GN

${GN:text}

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  coalesce(Insignia.title, '(Campo não preenchido)') AS "Grupo Clientes",
  COUNT(DISTINCT Clientes.id) AS "Quantidade"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations as pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people as Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN insignias as Insignia on Insignia.id = Clientes.insignia_id
WHERE
  Vendedor.id = $GN -- (Acassio Maciel) Filtro do vendedor
    AND Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado' -- Aspas simples para string literal

GROUP BY
  Insignia.title
ORDER BY
  "Quantidade" DESC

SELECT 
    Cliente.id AS "Código"

 FROM people AS Cliente 
 LEFT JOIN contracts Contratos ON Cliente.id = Contratos.client_id
 LEFT JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Cliente.id
 LEFT JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id=pci.proprietary_id

WHERE Vendedor.id = $GN
AND Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado' -- Aspas simples para string literal

group by Cliente.id

SELECT
  Contratos.id AS "Contrato"
  -- Contratos.v_stage AS "Status Contrato"
FROM
  people AS Cliente
  LEFT JOIN contracts Contratos ON Cliente.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Cliente.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE
  Vendedor.id = $GN
  AND Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado' -- Aspas simples para string literal
ORDER BY
  "Contrato"

SELECT 
  CONCAT('R$ ', FORMAT(SUM(Contratos.amount), 2, 'de_DE')) AS "Valor Contrato"

FROM people as Clientes
INNER JOIN contracts as Contratos ON Contratos.client_id = Clientes.id
INNER JOIN people_crm_informations as pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
INNER JOIN people as Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id

WHERE 
Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado'  -- Adicionei filtro para excluir cancelados
AND Vendedor.id = $GN -- (Acassio Maciel) Filtro do vendedor

SELECT
  CONCAT ('R$ ', FORMAT (AVG(Contratos.amount), 2, 'de_DE')) AS "Valor Contrato"
FROM
  people as Clientes
  INNER JOIN contracts as Contratos ON Contratos.client_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations as pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people as Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE
  Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado' -- Adicionei filtro para excluir cancelados
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN -- (Acassio Maciel) Filtro do vendedor

panels.title: Contratos filtrados por data de finalização

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    Cliente.id AS "codigo_cliente",
    Cliente.name AS "Razão social",
    -- TO_CHAR(Contratos.date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') as "Data contrato"
        CONCAT(
    SUBSTRING(Cliente.tx_id, 1, 2), '.',       -- primeiros dois dígitos
    SUBSTRING(Cliente.tx_id, 3, 3), '.',       -- três dígitos do meio
    SUBSTRING(Cliente.tx_id, 6, 3), '/',       -- mais três dígitos
    SUBSTRING(Cliente.tx_id, 9, 4), '-',       -- quatro dígitos antes do traço
    SUBSTRING(Cliente.tx_id, 13, 2)            -- últimos dois dígitos
  ) AS "CNPJ",
  Contratos.id AS "Contrato",
  DATE_FORMAT(beginning_date, '%d/%m/%Y') AS "Data de inicio",
  DATE_FORMAT(final_date, '%d/%m/%Y') AS "Data de finalização"

    -- Contratos.seller_1_id AS "ID vendedor",
    -- Vendedor.name AS "Vendedor"
FROM
  people AS Cliente
  LEFT JOIN contracts Contratos ON Cliente.id = Contratos.client_id
  LEFT JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Cliente.id
  LEFT JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE Vendedor.id = $GN
AND (
    -- Se a variável não foi preenchida no Grafana
    '${razao_social}' = '' 
    OR 
    -- Se foi preenchida, faz a busca com LIKE
    Cliente.name ILIKE '%${razao_social}%'
)
AND (
    -- Se a variável não foi preenchida no Grafana
    '${nome_fantasia}' = '' 
    OR 
    -- Se foi preenchida, faz a busca com LIKE
    Cliente.name_2 ILIKE '%${nome_fantasia}%'
)
AND (
    -- Se a variável não foi preenchida no Grafana
    '${CNPJ}' = '' 
    OR 
    -- Se foi preenchida, faz a busca com LIKE
    Cliente.tx_id ILIKE '%${CNPJ}%'
)
AND (
    '${id_contrato}' = '' 
    OR 
    Contratos.id::text ILIKE '%${id_contrato}%'
)
AND Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado'  -- Adicionei filtro para excluir cancelados
AND final_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
-- group by Cliente.id
-- LIMIT 10

panels.title: Contratos filtrados por data de finalização

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    Cliente.id AS "Código",
    Cliente.name AS "Razão social",
    -- TO_CHAR(Contratos.date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') as "Data contrato"
        CONCAT(
    SUBSTRING(Cliente.tx_id, 1, 2), '.',       -- primeiros dois dígitos
    SUBSTRING(Cliente.tx_id, 3, 3), '.',       -- três dígitos do meio
    SUBSTRING(Cliente.tx_id, 6, 3), '/',       -- mais três dígitos
    SUBSTRING(Cliente.tx_id, 9, 4), '-',       -- quatro dígitos antes do traço
    SUBSTRING(Cliente.tx_id, 13, 2)            -- últimos dois dígitos
  ) AS "CNPJ"

    -- Contratos.seller_1_id AS "ID vendedor",
    -- Vendedor.name AS "Vendedor"
FROM
  people AS Cliente
  LEFT JOIN contracts Contratos ON Cliente.id = Contratos.client_id
  LEFT JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Cliente.id
  LEFT JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE Vendedor.id = $GN
AND (
    -- Se a variável não foi preenchida no Grafana
    '${razao_social}' = '' 
    OR 
    -- Se foi preenchida, faz a busca com LIKE
    Cliente.name ILIKE '%${razao_social}%'
)
AND (
    -- Se a variável não foi preenchida no Grafana
    '${nome_fantasia}' = '' 
    OR 
    -- Se foi preenchida, faz a busca com LIKE
    Cliente.name_2 ILIKE '%${nome_fantasia}%'
)
AND (
    -- Se a variável não foi preenchida no Grafana
    '${CNPJ}' = '' 
    OR 
    -- Se foi preenchida, faz a busca com LIKE
    Cliente.tx_id ILIKE '%${CNPJ}%'
)
AND (
    '${id_contrato}' = '' 
    OR 
    Contratos.id::text ILIKE '%${id_contrato}%'
)
AND Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado'  -- Adicionei filtro para excluir cancelados
group by Cliente.id
-- LIMIT 10

SELECT
  Clientes.name AS "Razão Social"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  Contratos.id AS "Contrato",
  Contratos.v_stage AS "Status",
  Contratos.v_status as "Estagio "
FROM
  people AS Clientes
  LEFT JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
  -- AND Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado' -- Aspas simples para string literal
ORDER BY
  "Contrato"

SELECT
 coalesce(Clientes.name_2, '(Campo não preenchido)') AS "Nome Fantasia"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
    CONCAT(
    SUBSTRING(Clientes.tx_id, 1, 2), '.',       -- primeiros dois dígitos
    SUBSTRING(Clientes.tx_id, 3, 3), '.',       -- três dígitos do meio
    SUBSTRING(Clientes.tx_id, 6, 3), '/',       -- mais três dígitos
    SUBSTRING(Clientes.tx_id, 9, 4), '-',       -- quatro dígitos antes do traço
    SUBSTRING(Clientes.tx_id, 13, 2)            -- últimos dois dígitos
  ) AS "CNPJ"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  CONCAT ('R$ ', FORMAT (SUM(Contratos.amount), 2, 'de_DE')) AS "Valor Contrato"
FROM
  people AS Clientes
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
WHERE
  Vendedor.id = $GN
  AND Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado' -- Adicionei filtro para excluir cancelados

SELECT
  Clientes.phone AS "Telefone"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  Clientes.cell_phone_1 AS "Telefone"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  Clientes.email AS "Email"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  coalesce(Insignia.title, '(Campo não preenchido)') AS "Grupo Clientes"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations as pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people as Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN insignias as Insignia on Insignia.id = Clientes.insignia_id
WHERE
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  Contratos.id AS "Contrato"
FROM
  people AS Clientes
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  INNER JOIN contracts as Contratos ON Contratos.client_id = Clientes.id
WHERE
  Clientes.id IN ('$Clientes')
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
  AND Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado' -- Aspas simples para string literal
ORDER BY
  "Contrato"

SELECT
  Contato.name AS "Nome"
FROM
  people Clientes
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  JOIN people_contacts PC ON PC.person_id = Clientes.id
  JOIN people Contato ON Contato.id = PC.contact_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Contato.id IN ($contatos)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  Contato.email AS "Email"
FROM
  people Clientes
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  JOIN people_contacts PC ON PC.person_id = Clientes.id
  JOIN people Contato ON Contato.id = PC.contact_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Contato.id IN ($contatos)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  Contato.phone AS "Telefone"
FROM
  people Clientes
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  JOIN people_contacts PC ON PC.person_id = Clientes.id
  JOIN people Contato ON Contato.id = PC.contact_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Contato.id IN ($contatos)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT 
  Contratos.id AS "Contrato"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
  -- Order by "Contrato"

SELECT 
  CONCAT('R$ ', FORMAT(Contratos.amount, 2, 'de_DE')) AS "Valor Contrato" 
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  Vendedor.name AS "Vendedor"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  -- Contratos.id AS "Contrato",
  Produtos.title AS "Produto",
  Produtos.code AS "Código",
  Etiquetas.service_tag AS "Etiqueta"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN contract_service_tags Etiquetas ON Etiquetas.id = RCI.contract_service_tag_id
WHERE
  Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  -- and RCI.is_composition = false
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  -- Contratos.id AS "Contrato",
  Produtos.title AS "Produto",
  Produtos.code AS "Código",
  Etiquetas.title AS "Etiqueta"
FROM
  contract_items RCI
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Contratos.id = RCI.contract_id
  JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN people Clientes ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  JOIN contract_service_tags Etiquetas ON Etiquetas.id = RCI.contract_service_tag_id
WHERE
  Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  and RCI.is_composition = false
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT
  Contratos.description AS "Descrição Contrato"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT 
  CDC.title  AS "Contrato"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  INNER JOIN contract_date_configurations CDC ON CDC.id = Contratos.contract_date_configuration_id
where
  Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
  -- Order by "Contrato"

SELECT 
  CDC.collection_day  AS "Contrato"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  INNER JOIN contract_date_configurations CDC ON CDC.id = Contratos.contract_date_configuration_id
where
  Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
  -- Order by "Contrato"

SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(beginning_date, '%d/%m/%Y') AS "Data de inicio", 
  DATE_FORMAT(final_date, '%d/%m/%Y') AS "Data de finalização",
  DATE_FORMAT(billing_beginning_date, '%d/%m/%Y') AS "Inicio de Faturamento", 
  DATE_FORMAT(billing_final_date, '%d/%m/%Y') AS "Final de faturamento"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN

SELECT 
  Contratos.v_status AS "Contrato"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
  -- Order by "Contrato"

SELECT 
  Contratos.v_stage AS "Contrato"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
where
  Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
  -- Order by "Contrato"

SELECT
  CONCAT (
    Endereco.street,
    ', ',
    Endereco.number,
    CASE
      WHEN Endereco.address_complement IS NOT NULL
      AND Endereco.address_complement != '' THEN CONCAT (' - ', Endereco.address_complement)
      ELSE ''
    END,
    ' - ',
    Endereco.neighborhood
  ) as "Endereço Completo"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  LEFT JOIN people_addresses Endereco ON Endereco.id = Contratos.people_address_id
WHERE
  RCI.is_composition = false
  AND Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
GROUP BY
  Endereco.id

SELECT 
  Endereco.postal_code as "CEP"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  LEFT JOIN people_addresses Endereco ON Endereco.id = Contratos.people_address_id
WHERE
  RCI.is_composition = false
  AND Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
GROUP BY
  Endereco.id

SELECT 
  CONCAT(Endereco.city, ' - ', Endereco.state, ', ', Endereco.country) as "Endereço"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  LEFT JOIN people_addresses Endereco ON Endereco.id = Contratos.people_address_id
WHERE
  RCI.is_composition = false
  AND Clientes.id = ($Clientes)
  AND Contratos.id = ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
GROUP BY
  Endereco.id

SELECT
  Produtos.title AS "Produto"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
WHERE
  -- RCI.is_composition = false
   Produtos.code IN ($Produtos)
  AND Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
    and RCI.deleted = false

SELECT
  Produtos.code AS "Código"
FROM
  contract_items RCI
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Contratos.id = RCI.contract_id
  JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN people Clientes ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE
  Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  AND Produtos.code IN ($Produtos)
  -- and RCI.is_composition = false
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
    and RCI.deleted = false

  
  Group by Produtos.code

SELECT
  Etiquetas.description AS "Etiqueta Descrição"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN contract_service_tags Etiquetas ON Etiquetas.id = RCI.contract_service_tag_id
WHERE
  -- RCI.is_composition = false
   Produtos.code IN ($Produtos)
  AND Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
    and RCI.deleted = false

SELECT
  RCI.total_amount AS "Valor Produto"
FROM
  contract_items RCI
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Contratos.id = RCI.contract_id
  JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN people Clientes ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE
  Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  AND Produtos.code IN ($Produtos)
  -- and RCI.is_composition = false
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
    and RCI.deleted = false

  
  group by RCI.total_amount

SELECT
  Etiquetas.service_tag AS "Etiqueta"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN contract_service_tags Etiquetas ON Etiquetas.id = RCI.contract_service_tag_id
WHERE
  -- RCI.is_composition = false
   Produtos.code IN ($Produtos)
  AND Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
    and RCI.deleted = false

SELECT
  Etiquetas.title AS "Etiqueta Titulo"
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN contract_service_tags Etiquetas ON Etiquetas.id = RCI.contract_service_tag_id
WHERE
  -- RCI.is_composition = false
   Produtos.code IN ($Produtos)
  AND Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
    and RCI.deleted = false

SELECT
CONCAT (
    Endereco.street,
    ', ',
    Endereco.number,
    CASE
      WHEN Endereco.address_complement IS NOT NULL
      AND Endereco.address_complement != '' THEN CONCAT (' - ', Endereco.address_complement)
      ELSE ''
    END,
    ' - ',
    Endereco.neighborhood
  )
 AS "Endereço Completo"
  FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN authentication_contracts AC ON AC.contract_item_id = RCI.id
  JOIN people_addresses Endereco ON Endereco.id = AC.people_address_id
WHERE
  -- RCI.is_composition = false
   Produtos.code IN ($Produtos)
  AND Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
    and RCI.deleted = false

SELECT
  Endereco.postal_code as "CEP"

  FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN authentication_contracts AC ON AC.contract_item_id = RCI.id
  JOIN people_addresses Endereco ON Endereco.id = AC.people_address_id
WHERE
  -- RCI.is_composition = false
   Produtos.code IN ($Produtos)
  AND Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
    and RCI.deleted = false

SELECT
  CONCAT(Endereco.city, ' - ', Endereco.state, ', ', Endereco.country) as "Endereço"

  FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN authentication_contracts AC ON AC.contract_item_id = RCI.id
  JOIN people_addresses Endereco ON Endereco.id = AC.people_address_id
WHERE
  -- RCI.is_composition = false
   Produtos.code IN ($Produtos)
  AND Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
    and RCI.deleted = false

panels.description: Endereço vinculado diretamente ao Contrato especifico

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
CONCAT (
    Endereco.street,
    ', ',
    Endereco.number,
    CASE
      WHEN Endereco.address_complement IS NOT NULL
      AND Endereco.address_complement != '' THEN CONCAT (' - ', Endereco.address_complement)
      ELSE ''
    END,
    ' - ',
    Endereco.neighborhood
  )
 AS "Endereço Completo"
  FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  AND Contratos.deleted = false
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id
  AND RCI.deleted = false
  LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id
  JOIN authentication_contracts AC ON AC.contract_id = Contratos.id AND AC.service_product_id = Produtos.id
  JOIN people_addresses Endereco ON Endereco.id = AC.people_address_id
WHERE
  -- RCI.is_composition = false
   Produtos.code IN ($Produtos)
  AND Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
    and RCI.deleted = false
    LIMIT 1

panels.title: Cidade

list.definition:
SELECT 
 Cliente.id

FROM
  people AS Cliente
  LEFT JOIN contracts Contratos ON Cliente.id = Contratos.client_id
  LEFT JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Cliente.id
  LEFT JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE Vendedor.id = $GN
list.label: Clientes
list.name: Clientes
list.query:
SELECT 
 Cliente.id

FROM
  people AS Cliente
  LEFT JOIN contracts Contratos ON Cliente.id = Contratos.client_id
  LEFT JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Cliente.id
  LEFT JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE Vendedor.id = $GN

list.definition:
SELECT 
CONCAT( Contratos.id, '__',  Contratos.description)

FROM
  people AS Clientes
  LEFT JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
  AND Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado' -- Aspas simples para string literal
list.name: Contrato
list.query:
SELECT 
CONCAT( Contratos.id, '__',  Contratos.description)

FROM
  people AS Clientes
  LEFT JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
WHERE
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
  AND Contratos.v_stage != 'Cancelado' -- Aspas simples para string literal

list.definition:
SELECT

CONCAT( Produtos.code, '__', Produtos.title)

FROM people Clientes
JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id=Contratos.client_id AND Contratos.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN people Vendedor ON Contratos.seller_1_id = Vendedor.user_id
LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id AND RCI.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id

WHERE Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)

-- and RCI.is_composition = false
GROUP by Produtos.id
list.name: Produtos
list.query:

CONCAT( Produtos.code, '__', Produtos.title)

FROM people Clientes
JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id=Contratos.client_id AND Contratos.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN people Vendedor ON Contratos.seller_1_id = Vendedor.user_id
LEFT JOIN contract_items RCI ON RCI.contract_id = Contratos.id AND RCI.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN service_products Produtos ON Produtos.id = RCI.service_product_id

WHERE Contratos.id IN ($Contrato)

-- and RCI.is_composition = false
GROUP by Produtos.id

CONCAT(Vendedor.id, '__', Vendedor.name)

 FROM people AS Cliente 
 INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Cliente.id
 INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id=pci.proprietary_id

 FROM people AS Cliente

 INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id=pci.proprietary_id

list.definition:
SELECT
  Contato.id
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  INNER JOIN people_contacts PC ON PC.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people Contato ON Contato.id = PC.contact_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
list.name: contatos
list.query:
SELECT
  Contato.id
FROM
  people Clientes
  JOIN contracts Contratos ON Clientes.id = Contratos.client_id
  INNER JOIN people_crm_informations pci ON pci.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people AS Vendedor ON Vendedor.id = pci.proprietary_id
  INNER JOIN people_contacts PC ON PC.person_id = Clientes.id
  INNER JOIN people Contato ON Contato.id = PC.contact_id
where
  Clientes.id IN ($Clientes)
  AND Vendedor.id = $GN
